Text:
![](_page_0_Picture_1.jpeg) WORK INSTRUCTION – RECONFIG – LABEL PRINTING ## **LABEL PRINTING (RECONFIG)** The following Inventory labels can be generated directly from the scangun: | Label
Type | Format | Label Description | Preview | |---------------|-------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------| | LPN | EU_PICKDROP_AUDIT | Audit Label that is used in the Drop Zone to validate the items
and quantities picked before they are dropped to the
Consolidation Locators for packing | | **Step 1:** Using the Mobile Application, select the Responsibility 'ZTC Warehouse Ops Mobile NALA' and navigate to 'Label Printing' **Step 2:** Select option 'Printer Sign-on' to log into the printer - Scan or enter the printer name - Select 'All Labels' as the Label Type Click on the 'Sign On' button The message 'Sign on successful' will be displayed at the bottom *Please note: If you are already signed on to another printer, then use the 'Sign-Off' option first* **Step 3:** Select option 'Label Request' to print a label - Select the correct Label Type (using the search icon) - Select the correct Format (using the search icon) Depending on the chosen Format, additional parameters may be displayed *Note: You do not have to scan the printer name again* - Enter the number of labels ('Copies') you want to print (default = 1) Click on 'More' to print more labels or 'Done' if you are finished printing ![](_page_0_Picture_18.jpeg) ![](_page_0_Picture_19.jpeg) ![](_page_0_Picture_20.jpeg) *Note: To login to the printer for the Common Cradle labels, you only have to complete steps 1 and 2* The labels will be printed on the printer you have signed onto (step 2) Document: WI - ReConfig - Label Printing v1.0.docx Page 1 of 1 July 18, 2024
